𝜗🤍𝜚

I'm going to be. A little sappy in this yappy...bever let me rhyme again but Im so glad I found my audience like no matter who comes and who goes you guys always stayed, and always supported me no matter if the bot was bad or if I wasn't posting for weeks<3 everytime I considered leaving everyone I just remember that would mean I would leave all over two thousand of u and that breaks my heart genuinely. Cz itd mean I'd never get to talk to you guys abt my day and id never be able to write for you guys again . No matter how strict this website gets ill find some way or another to post for you guys frl 🙏🏻 thank you for all of the support you've given me in these past almost two years

PLEASE DONOT REPOST MY WORK ONTO OTHER PLATFORMS. IF YOU HAPPEN TO BE HEAVILY INSPIRED, PLEASE CREDIT ME. THANK YOU.

DISCLAIMER | all my bots are self indulgent. I do NOT think of the idols this way at all, it is just a silly little bot. You don't like it? You don't interact. If you are uncomfortable, you have the right to click off.
